title: Department of Psychology - Student Opinions
content:
Department of Psychology - Student Opinions

"The main reason for me to choose Istanbul Esenyurt University was the academic staff of the Psychology department. We have highly-equipped instructors with knowledge and experience in their field. When we have any questions or problems, we can easily reach our instructors, contact one-to-one, request help and find answers to our questions. I think this is an important opportunity. There are lots of activities in our school so that we can improve ourselves. Our expert lecturers working in our field are hosted at these events. In addition to theoretical knowledge, we can meet practically every branch of the psychology department. Our school not only supports us academically, but also supports our hobbies in the activities and events it organizes. Plenty of activities are organized to introduce us to innovations. I am happy to be in IESU"

"Many people dream of going to university. I made this dream real at Esenyurt University. I am about to finish my education as a psychologist which I started as a high sclool graduate. Our university provides opportunities for our professional development and socialization in many ways. We socialize with dozens of events organized, and we carry out our professional development with the training provided and the seminars and courses given by qualified and successful people. When we graduate, we are provided with the professional equipment that will help us in Professional life. am grateful to my school for these opportunities. I'm glad I'm at Esenyurt University!"

Gizem Ekici

This content was updated on 09/09/2024.
